page_content:
Prerequisite: HESP202.

Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department; and sophomore standing or higher.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

Formerly: HESP388.

HESP498 Seminar (3 Credits)

Selected topics in human communication and its disorders.

Restriction: Permission of BSOS-Hearing & Speech Sciences department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
